description: Accounts in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals. List of names in the right column, with numbers in the left column. The names include a chicken seller (dajjājī), a couple of druggists (ʿaṭṭār), a clothier (bazzāz), a sugar maker (sukkarī), and a certain Sayyid al-Ahl.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
